channel.title: grammar on grammer of faŋtrəntrəŋ
channel.description: Recent content in grammar on grammer of faŋtrəntrəŋ

item.title: functional sentence
item.description:
Statement Sentence

Inverted sentence

Question Sentence

a sentence or phrase used to find out information疑问句

aux verb提前

who,whose,how

Imperative Sentence

祈使句;紧急的;命令的;

used to describe the form of a verb that is usually used for giving orders

Exclamatory Sentence

感叹句

how + adj/adv + S + V

what + a/an + adj + N + S + LV

item.title: simple sentence
item.description:
english explain
S(subject) 主语 the person or thing that performs the action of a verb, or is joined to a description by a verb
O(object) 宾语 a noun or noun phrase that is affected by the action of a verb or that follows a preposition
IO(Indirect Object) 间接宾语
DO(Direct Object) 直接宾语
V(predicate) 谓语 in grammar, the part of a sentence that contains the verb and gives information about the subject
C(complement) 补语 a part of a clause that usually follows the verb in English and adds more information about the subject or object.adj
P(predicative) 表语 (in grammar, especially of adjectives or phrases) following a verb

phrase: a group of words that is part of, rather than the whole of, a sentence 短语

item.title: complex sentence - clause
item.description:
clause: a group of words containing a subject and a verb, that is usually only part of a sentence.句子;从句

graph TD
    A[clause]
    B[noun]
    C[adjective]
    D[adverb] 
    E[subject]
    F[object]
    G[apposition]
    H[predicative]
    I[attributive]
    J[adverbial]
    A --> B
    A --> C 
    A --> D
    B --> E
    B --> F
    B --> G
    B --> H
    C --> I
    D --> J

noun clause

subject

主语从句whether, where,when,how,that

what who:The introductory word functions as a component in the subordinate clause引导词在从句中作成分

item.title: base - part of speech
item.description:
num:number

interj:interjection

Interjections are short words or phrases used to express sudden feelings like surprise, joy, anger, or sadness. In daily conversations, these emotional expressions make speech more natural and engaging.

感叹词

verb

a word or phrase that describes an action, condition, or experience

three types of verbs

  • Principal Verbs(实意动词):vt,vi

  • Auxiliary Verbs(助动词,表达时态,语态,否定):Primary,Modal

  • Link Verbs(系动词):am,is,are,was,were

a:article

a;

an;元音音素发音开始的词之前.(n起到连读作用)

the;具体的

adj:adjective

a word that describes a noun or pronoun 描述名词或代词

n:noun

A noun is a word that names something, like a person, place, thing, or idea. In a sentence, nouns can do different jobs.
